extraction.one_line_summary: DECLERCQ Yves surprised the peloton by launching a breakaway sprint inside 1.5km, holding off the bunch by seconds after they expected a field sprint.
tactical_patterns: Three-man break attacked inside 1.5km when gap dropped to 23 seconds, exploiting peloton's assumption of inevitable catch.
VALVERDE forced YATES Simon to chase at inopportune moment near finish, fracturing team pursuit organization before final kilometer.
DECLERCQ wheelsucked BISTROM's sprint until 200m on uphill finish, converting positioning over raw power when breakaway ally faded.

rider_signals.DECLERCQ Yves: positive: Demonstrated sprint craft by waiting until 200m on uphill despite being weaker sprinter than breakaway companion BISTROM
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: Marked VALVERDE defensively near finish rather than positioning for sprint, revealing GC priorities over stage hunting
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: Late positioning move disrupted peloton's chase coordination when gap was only 16 seconds inside final kilometer
